title: Positive flow: Navigating back to the previous screen
test_steps: Tap the back arrow in the app bar to navigate back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The app should navigate back to the previous screen.

title: Negative flow: Clicking on the three-dot menu icon
test_steps: Click on the three-dot menu icon on the right side of the list row.
expected_result: The app should display a context menu with options related to the artist.

title: UI test: Verifying the app bar title
test_steps: Verify that the app bar title is correctly displayed as 'Artists'.
expected_result: The app bar title should be 'Artists'.

title: Usability test: Tapping on the image
test_steps: Tap on the image of the person playing a stringed instrument.
expected_result: The app should navigate to a screen displaying more details about the artist.

title: Accessibility test: Screen reader interaction
test_steps: Use a screen reader to navigate through the screen and verify that all elements are accessible.
expected_result: All elements should be accessible via screen reader.

title: Usability test: Tapping on the list row
test_steps: Tap on the list row containing the text '<unknown>'.
expected_result: The app should navigate to a screen displaying more details about the artist.
